title: ExampleAI releases a browser-use agent for enterprise workflows
summary: ExampleAI announced a browser-use agent for enterprise workflows. The post says it can operate web apps, fill forms, and produce audit logs for human review. This is sample data for the yoko-video open-source workflow.

scores.one_liner: 企业级浏览器 Agent 发布
scores.chinese_angle: AI 开始接管网页后台操作
